billingDescription: Stories that haven't been paid for yet. Pick a pack for any story to unlock it.
billingEmptyDescription: All your stories are unlocked. New stories you discover will show up here if they need payment.
cancelledDescription: Your checkout was cancelled. Nothing was charged. You can try again whenever you're ready.
checkoutInProgressDescription: Complete the checkout in the tab you started, or wait a few minutes for it to expire before trying again.
checkoutInProgressTitle: A checkout is already in progress
errorCheckoutUnavailable: We couldn't start the checkout. Please try again.
initiateFailedDescription: Something went wrong while starting checkout. Please try again in a moment.
paymentSuccessDescription: Your pack has been unlocked. You can find it in your stories.
paymentsUnavailableDescription: Payments are not available for this publisher right now. Please check back later.
successConfirmingDescription: We're confirming your payment. This usually takes a few seconds.
successFailedDescription: Your payment didn't go through. You haven't been charged. You can try again or head back to your dashboard.
successLookupErrorDescription: We couldn't look up your payment. If you were charged, check your dashboard — your order will appear once it's confirmed.
successPendingDescription: Your payment is still being confirmed. We'll email you once your pack is ready.
campaignSubtitle: Multi-channel campaign on {{brand}} — one simple price, no recurring fees.
stateNetworkDescription: Publish your campaign on 4 additional publications across Minnesota — multiplying your reach to 10M+ potential viewers.
stateNetworkSalesNote: Reach upgrades require a sales conversation — we'll follow up after checkout.
fullNetworkDescription: Advertise across our entire publication network with a dedicated sales representative. Your purchase today is credited toward any larger package.
completePageViewedSubtitle: Review your selection and complete checkout.
sessionExpiredBody: We couldn't load your story session. Head home and start fresh — your previous discovery is still saved.
deliverableSponsoredArticleDescription: Custom feature story published on the site
deliverableSocialCampaignDescription: Multi-post launch and impact updates across Facebook
deliverableNewsletterDescription: Sponsored placement in the daily email
deliverableDisplayAdsDescription: Banner placements across the publisher's site
